title: Figs 1A–H. Achradina pulchra. A–B in Achradina pulchra, a Unique Dinoflagellate (Amphilothales, Dinophyceae) with a Radiolarian-like Endoskeleton of Celestite (Strontium Sulfate)
author: Gómez, Fernando
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figs 1A–H. Achradina pulchra. A–B – Light micrographs of the isolated cells of Achradina pulchra for PCR analysis from the SW Atlantic (São Sebastião Channel). C–D – Other cells from the same sample. Note that the skeleton is internal. E–G – Scanning electron micrographs of the skeleton from the NE Atlantic (Seine and Sedlo Seamounts). H – X-ray energy dispersive spectroscopy (EDS) spectrum of the endoskeleton. Scale bars: 5 µm.
steps_raw: Figs 1A–H. Achradina pulchra. A–B – Light micrographs of the isolated cells of Achradina pulchra for PCR analysis from the SW Atlantic (São Sebastião Channel).
